title: gentianella crispata subsp. amblyphylla
intro: Gentianella crispata subsp. amblyphylla, also known as Alpine gentian or Mountain gentian, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter constituents that stimulate digestion and liver function, and are used to treat digestive issues such as indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Gentianella crispata subsp. amblyphylla include its ability to improve appetite and reduce nausea, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, although its preparation and use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with certain medications.
